title: Onboard Generate — v3 Context Shape
description: Input schema for onboard:generate in onboard 3.x. v3 is the ONLY accepted shape (the v2 headless API was removed in 3.0.0). The context is the internal object built by onboard:start (version:3 + analysis + wizardAnswers + an OPTIONAL top-level `research` object, canonical shape: onboard/schemas/research-dossier.json). There is no `phases` block and no inheritance from a v2 schema. v1 and v2 are rejected. NOTE: `research` is OPTIONAL here; generate makes it required for a full generation (and exempt for callerExtras.regenerateOnly re-emits) at runtime — see generate/SKILL.md Step 0.1.

version.description: Schema version. HARD-REQUIRED and the only accepted value. v1 and v2 are rejected.

research.description: Optional synthesized research object. Canonical shape: onboard/schemas/research-dossier.json.
